questions.question: Which restaurants in Austin Tx are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Restaurants in Austin Tx with weekend hours include: Starbucks (Sat: 04:30-21:00), Waterloo Ice House (Sat: 08:00-23:00), Domino's (Sat: 10:00-01:00), Tacodeli (Sat: 08:00-21:00), Domino's (Sat: 10:00-01:00), McDonald's (Sat: 00:00-24:00), Zaxby's (Sat: 10:00-21:00), CraigO's Pizza & Pastaria (Sat: 11:00-20:45) and 359 more. 367 total with weekend availability.
